ValidationRule.description: When request has a Past due date and if the value of field 'Status' is Work in Progress or changed to Completed or Rejected, the field 'Delay reason" shouldn't be null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Data_Performance_Management_Request', ISPICKVAL( Delay_reason__c, ''), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status,'Work in progress'), Due_date__c < TODAY() ) , AND( ISPICKVAL(Status,'Rejected'), Due_date__c < TODAY(), ISCHANGED(Status)),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Status,'Completed'), Due_date__c < TODAY(), ISCHANGED(Status)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a Delay reason when the request has a past due date
